texto: The lingerie department is the only one that she can reach in her wheelchair. Nevertheless, she is fired the next day because of complaints that a woman who is so obviously not sexually attractive selling alluring nightgowns makes customers uncomfortable. Daunted by her dismissal, she seeks consolation in the arms of the young manager and soon finds herself pregnant. Upon learningof this news, he leaves her for anondisabled woman with a fullerbustline and better homemaking skills in his inaccessible kitchen.
explicacao: Citação de Rosemarie Garland-Thomson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The lingerie department is the only one that she can reach in her wheelchair. Nevertheless, she i…” articula sabedoria, ableism, accessibility em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
